name: Building Cloudflare apps
description: How to build a full-stack web app on Cloudflare Workers — a React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend: choosing the scaffold, project layout, wrangler.jsonc semantics, the SPA-vs-Worker routing rules, the verify workflow, and bindings. Building only; deploying and shipping to a forge are separate skills.

bootstrap: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl git jq && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
